privileged_info_summary: The task involves uploading a synthetic backup log PDF file (Backup_Log_Sept2025.pdf) to a compliance analysis record in Eramba. The file is created during setup_task.sh with dummy PDF 1.4 structure plus 5120 bytes of random data. The compliance items are seeded into the database during setup: a compliance package named 'ISO 27001 (Internal)' containing a control item with ID 'A.12.3.1' and name 'Information Backup' (based on the real ISO 27001:2013 Annex A.12.3.1 standard for information backup controls). All data is synthetic and created as part of task initialization.
